events.name: ROLL_DICE
events.description: Emits UI:ROLL_DICE when the roll-dice button (or Space) is pressed.

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emitted when a token reaches the final track cell.

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:PLAY_AGAIN from the gameover menu.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Pieces
overridableConfigKeys.description: The two race tokens (you, rival) seeded onto the start cell.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Track
overridableConfigKeys.description: Ordered snake path of 64 cells from start to finish.
